stages.task: Scrape r/SideProject, r/Entrepreneur, r/IndieBiz for posts: 'gave up', 'shutting down', 'not worth it', 'anyone want to take over', 'built but no users'. Filter: poster age <25 or self-identified young founder.
For each target: estimate asset value (traffic, code quality signals, niche). Flag gap where stated frustration > actual asset value. Score undervaluation 1-10.

Generate 3 content pieces per batch: (1) Twitter thread 'I found 7 abandoned apps worth $X each — here is how to spot them', (2) engagement post calling out the gap, (3) outreach template to the founder.
For score >= 7: draft cold DM to founder offering to connect them with a buyer or acquire directly. Log to LEDGER/BROKERING_PIPELINE.csv.
